title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Dunzo - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Dunzo - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Dunzo family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Lucknow. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Dunzo:
Dunzo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dunzo!
